document.docAuthor: Zhou, Ya-Dong, Mwachala, Geoffrey, Hu, Guang-Wan & Wang, Qing-Feng
document.masterDocTitle: Annotated checklist of the vascular plants of Mount Kenya, East Africa

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: Annotated checklist of the vascular plants of Mount Kenya, East Africa

subSubSection.paragraph: Habitat: HZ, AZ; 3 300–4 400 m. Distribution: IIIb.
Voucher: Timau Track, near Solo Camp Site, Alt. 3 324 m, 21 Jan. 2015, SAJIT 002755 (HIB).
References: Moreau (1944), Rehder et al. (1981), Young & Peacock (1985), Blundell (1987), Bussmann (1993, 1994, 2006), Beentje (1994), Beentje et al. (2005), Abdi (2013), Agnew (2013).
